languages.text: "Мне не нужна твоя жалость. Ни сейчас, ни когда-либо еще".
"I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."
languages.original_text: "Мне не нужна твоя жалость. Ни сейчас, ни когда-либо еще".

traits.locale_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."
"I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."
"I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."
"I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."
"I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

languages.text: "Ich will Euer Mitleid nicht. Jetzt nicht und auch in Zukunft nicht."
languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will Euer Mitleid nicht. Jetzt nicht und auch in Zukunft nicht."

languages.text: « Je ne veux pas de votre pitié. Ni maintenant, ni jamais. »
languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne veux pas de votre pitié. Ni maintenant, ni jamais. »

languages.text: «No quiero su compasión. Ni ahora ni nunca».
languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

traits.locale_text: «No quiero su compasión. Ni ahora ni nunca».

languages.text: 「哀れみは止めて。一生いらないわ」
languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

traits.locale_text: 「哀れみは止めて。一生いらないわ」

languages.text: “我不需要你的怜悯。现在不需要，以后也不需要。”
languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

traits.locale_text: “我不需要你的怜悯。现在不需要，以后也不需要。”

languages.original_text: "I do not want your pity. Not now, not ever."

languages.text: "Ne şimdi ne de başka bir zaman bana acımanı istemiyorum."
